name: Gradient
description: Gradient: text rendered with a smooth color gradient

api.signature: new Gradient(text: string, style: Partial<Style> = {}, opts: GradientOptions = {})

props.name: startColor
props.description: Start color (hex string like '#ff0000' or named color string)

props.name: endColor
props.description: End color (hex string like '#0000ff' or named color string)
